# Polymart API - AI-Readable Reference
# https://polymart.co/llms.txt
# Format: llms.txt v1 (https://llmstxt.org)
#
# Polymart is a persistent simulated financial market with three asset classes:
#   - Stocks:  132 fictional tickers across 20 sectors
#   - Forex:   39 simulated currency pairs (major, minor, exotic)
#   - Crypto:  132 simulated cryptocurrencies across 12 categories
#
# All data is entirely fictional - not financial advice.
# Simulation ticks every 10 seconds. No API key required.

> Polymart exposes three simulated markets via an open REST API.
> All endpoints are GET requests returning JSON. Base URL: https://polymart.co
> No authentication. Rate limit: 400 tokens per 60s per IP (heavy routes cost 3 each).
> Prices update every 10 seconds via a server-side simulation engine.

---

## Overview

- Base URL: https://polymart.co
- All endpoints: GET, returning JSON
- Authentication: none required
- Tick interval: 10 seconds (all three markets update together)
- Stocks: 132 tickers across 20 sectors
- Forex: 39 currency pairs (major / minor / exotic)
- Crypto: 132 coins across 12 categories
- History: up to 400 price points per asset (oldest first)

Heavy routes (cost 3 tokens each): /getStocks, /getHistory, /getLeaderboard, /forex/getCorrelations

---

## STOCKS API

### GET /api/v1/getMarket
Global stock market snapshot.

Response fields:
- index (number): Current market index value
- indexChange (number): Absolute change from previous tick
- indexChangePct (number): Percentage change from previous tick
- fearGreed (number): Fear & Greed score, 0–100
- fearGreedLabel (string): Extreme Fear | Fear | Cautious | Neutral | Greed | High Greed | Extreme Greed
- vix (number): Simulated volatility index
- marketSession (string): open | closed | pre | after
- advanceDecline (number): Advance/decline ratio
- newHighs (number): Stocks at new 52w highs this tick
- newLows (number): Stocks at new 52w lows this tick
- interestRate (number): Simulated interest rate (%)
- inflation (number): Simulated inflation rate (%)
- gdpGrowth (number): Simulated GDP growth rate (%)
- gainers (number): Stocks with positive tick change
- losers (number): Stocks with negative tick change
- unchanged (number): Flat stocks this tick
- totalStocks (number): Total stocks in simulation
- topGainer (object {ticker, pct}): Biggest gainer this tick
- topLoser (object {ticker, pct}): Biggest loser this tick
- upStreak (number): Consecutive index up-ticks
- downStreak (number): Consecutive index down-ticks
- tickCount (number): Total ticks since simulation started
- updatedAt (ISO 8601): Timestamp of last tick

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getMarket

---

### GET /api/v1/getStocks
All 132 stocks as a map keyed by ticker symbol.

Query parameters:
- sector (string, optional): Filter by sector key (e.g. tech, crypto, ai)

Response: object keyed by ticker symbol, each value containing:
- name (string): Company name
- sector (string): Sector key
- mcap (string): large | mid | small
- price (number): Current price
- change (number): % change from previous tick
- volume (number): Cumulative simulated volume
- buyVolume, sellVolume (number): Directional volume
- orderFlow (number): Buy pressure, −50 to +50; positive = more buying
- rsi (number): RSI, 0–100
- streak (number): Consecutive up (+) or down (−) ticks
- hi52w, lo52w (number): 52-week high/low
- bid, ask, spreadPct (number): Current bid/ask/spread
- vwap (number): Volume-weighted average price
- session (string): Current session state
- halted (boolean): true if trading is halted
- atr (number): Average True Range
- beta (number): Beta relative to index
- macd, macdSignal, macdHist (number): MACD indicators
- bbUpper, bbMiddle, bbLower, bbBw (number): Bollinger Bands
- sma20, sma50 (number): Simple moving averages
- volatility, trend (number | null): Simulation parameters from stock definition

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStocks
Example (filtered): https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStocks?sector=crypto

---

### GET /api/v1/getStock
Full detail for a single stock including price history, candles, and sector peers.

Query parameters:
- ticker (string, required): Ticker symbol, case-insensitive (e.g. APEX)

Response fields (superset of getStocks, plus):
- ticker (string): Ticker symbol
- previousPrice (number): Price at previous tick
- openPrice (number): Price at simulation open
- changeSinceOpen (number): % change from open price
- allTimeHigh (number): All-time simulated high
- momentum (number): Price momentum factor
- insiderBias (number): Hidden insider pressure, −0.01 to 0.01
- ema12, ema26 (number): Exponential moving averages
- history (number[]): Price history, up to 400 entries, oldest first
- candles (object[]): OHLCV candle data
- sectorPeers (string[]): Tickers of other stocks in the same sector
- updatedAt (ISO 8601): Timestamp of last update

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getStock?ticker=APEX

---

### GET /api/v1/getSectors
All 20 sectors with aggregate statistics.

Response: object keyed by sector key, each value containing:
- label (string): Human-readable sector name
- icon (string): Emoji icon
- avgChange (number): Average % change across sector stocks
- avgRsi (number): Average RSI
- avgBeta (number): Average beta
- newsStack (number): Accumulated news impact score (decays over time)
- momentum (number): Sector price momentum
- tickers (string[]): All ticker symbols in this sector
- tickerCount (number): Number of stocks in sector

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getSectors

---

### GET /api/v1/getSector
Full detail for a single sector including constituent stocks.

Query parameters:
- sector (string, required): Sector key (e.g. crypto)

Response fields:
- key, label, icon, avgChange, newsStack, momentum
- stocks (object[]): Array of {ticker, name, price, change, volume, rsi, bid, ask, spreadPct, vwap, macd, macdHist, bbBw, session, halted}
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getSector?sector=crypto

---

### GET /api/v1/getEvents
Recent market events - flash crashes, sector booms, FDA approvals, meme frenzies, etc.

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): Max events, 1–40, default 10
- sector (string, optional): Filter to a specific sector
- category (string, optional): Filter by event category

Response: array of event objects, each containing:
- id (uuid): Unique event ID
- text (string): Event description
- effect (number): Price effect magnitude; negative = bearish
- sector (string | null): Affected sector key, or null for market-wide events
- weight (number): Impact weight, 1–3
- category (string | null): Event category
- firedAt (ISO 8601): When the event fired

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getEvents?limit=5

---

### GET /api/v1/getTopMovers
Top N gainers and top N losers by tick-over-tick % change.

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): Stocks per list, 1–20, default 5

Response fields:
- gainers (object[]): {ticker, name, sector, price, change, volume, rsi, atr, beta, session, halted}, best first
- losers (object[]): Same shape, worst first

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getTopMovers?limit=5

---

### GET /api/v1/getLeaderboard
All stocks ranked by any numeric field.

Query parameters:
- by (string, optional): change | price | volume | rsi | ath | streak | atr | beta | spreadPct | bbBw; default: change
- dir (string, optional): asc | desc; default: desc
- limit (number, optional): Max results, 1–132; default: 10

Response fields:
- sortedBy (string), direction (string), count (number)
- stocks (object[]): {ticker, name, sector, mcap, price, change, volume, rsi, ath, streak, atr, beta, spreadPct, bbBw}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getLeaderboard?by=change&limit=10

---

### GET /api/v1/getMacro
Current macroeconomic environment variables.

Response fields:
- interestRate, inflation, gdpGrowth (number): Macro rates (%)
- fearGreed (number): 0–100; fearGreedLabel (string)
- vix (number): Volatility index
- marketSession (string): Session state
- advanceDecline, newHighs, newLows (number): Market breadth indicators
- crashCooldown (number): Ticks until next crash possible; 0 = ready
- boomCooldown (number): Ticks until next boom possible
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getMacro

---

### GET /api/v1/getHistory
Raw price history for a single stock.

Query parameters:
- ticker (string, required): Ticker symbol (e.g. VOID)
- limit (number, optional): Data points, 1–400; default: 100

Response fields:
- ticker, name, count
- history (number[]): Price array, oldest first
- candles (object[]): OHLCV candle data
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getHistory?ticker=VOID&limit=50

---

### GET /api/v1/search
Full-text search across ticker symbols, company names, and sector keys.

Query parameters:
- q (string, required): Search query

Response fields:
- query, count
- results (object[]): {ticker, name, sector, price, change, rsi, session}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/search?q=moon

---

### GET /api/v1/info
Detailed company info for a stock including analyst rating, news, and macro context.

Query parameters:
- ticker (string, required): Ticker symbol

Response fields (includes everything from getStock, plus):
- companyName, description, founded, employees, headquarters, ceo, website
- sectorKey, sectorLabel, sectorIcon
- peers (string[]): Sector peer tickers
- market (object): Full price/indicator snapshot
- macro (object): {fearGreed, interestRate, inflation, gdpGrowth, vix}
- analystRating (object): {rating, score, analystCount}
  - rating: Strong Buy | Buy | Hold | Underperform
- news (string[]): Generated news headlines for this ticker

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/info?ticker=APEX

---

### GET /api/v1/getHealth
API health check.

Response fields:
- status (string): ok | uninitialised
- tickCount, secondsSinceLastTick, stale, totalStocks, totalSectors
- vix, marketSession, fearGreed
- updatedAt (ISO 8601 | null)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/getHealth

---

### GET /api/v1/rss
Market events as an RSS 2.0 feed (also accepts /rss.xml).

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): Max items, 1–100; default 40
- sector (string, optional): Filter to sector

Response: application/rss+xml

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/rss?limit=10

---

### GET /api/v1/sims
List of active simulations with metadata.

Response: array of {id, label, icon, status, description, assets, tickInterval, ...}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/sims

---

## FOREX API

### GET /api/v1/forex/getPairs
All forex pairs as a map keyed by pair symbol.

Query parameters:
- category (string, optional): major | minor | exotic

Response: object keyed by pair (e.g. "EURUSD"), each containing:
- pair, base, quote, category
- baseName, quoteName, baseCountry, quoteCountry, baseFlag, quoteFlag
- price, prevPrice, change, changePct (number)
- bid, ask, spread, spreadPips (number)
- hiSession, loSession (number): Session high/low
- hi52w, lo52w (number): 52-week high/low
- volume, rsi, momentum, atr (number)
- macd, macdSignal, macdHist (number)
- stochK, stochD, cci (number)
- bbUpper, bbMiddle, bbLower, bbBw (number)
- sma20, sma50 (number)
- pipSize, decimals (number)
- pivotP, pivotR1, pivotR2, pivotS1, pivotS2 (number): Daily pivot levels
- pctFrom52wHigh, pctFrom52wLow (number)
- activeSession (string): Currently active trading sessions
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getPairs
Example (filtered): https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getPairs?category=major

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getPair
Full detail for a single currency pair including history and economic context.

Query parameters:
- pair (string, required): Pair symbol, case-insensitive (e.g. EURUSD)

Response: all fields from getPairs, plus:
- description (string): Pair description
- economicDrivers (string[]): Key economic factors for this pair
- factSheet (object): Additional metadata
- history (number[]): Price history, up to 400 entries, oldest first
- candles (object[]): OHLCV candle data

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getPair?pair=EURUSD

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getTopMovers
Top N gainers and losers by % change.

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): Pairs per list, 1–14, default 5

Response fields:
- gainers (object[]): {pair, base, quote, category, baseFlag, quoteFlag, price, change, rsi}
- losers (object[]): Same shape, worst first

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getTopMovers?limit=5

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getHistory
Raw price history for a single pair.

Query parameters:
- pair (string, required): Pair symbol
- limit (number, optional): Data points, 1–400; default: 60

Response fields:
- pair, base, quote, count
- history (number[]): Oldest first
- candles (object[]): OHLCV candle data
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getHistory?pair=EURUSD&limit=60

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/search
Search by pair symbol, base/quote currency code, or currency name.

Query parameters:
- q (string, required): Search query

Response fields:
- query, count
- results (object[]): {pair, base, quote, category, baseName, quoteName, baseFlag, quoteFlag, price, change, rsi}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/search?q=eur

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getMarketOverview
Aggregated forex market data including currency strength and session status.

Response fields:
- dollarIndex (number): USD strength vs basket
- dollarIndexLabel (string): USD Strengthening | USD Weakening | USD Neutral
- totalPairs, bullishPairs, bearishPairs (number)
- topGainer, topLoser (object {pair, changePct})
- avgVolatility (number)
- currencyStrength (object[]): {code, strength, flag} sorted strongest first
- sessions (object): {sydney, tokyo, london, newYork} each with {label, open, timezone, majorPairs}
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getMarketOverview

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getLeaderboard
All pairs ranked by any metric.

Query parameters:
- by (string, optional): changePct | volume | rsi | atr | spread | bbBw; default: changePct
- dir (string, optional): asc | desc; default: desc
- limit (number, optional): Max results, 1–40; default: 10
- category (string, optional): major | minor | exotic

Response fields:
- sortedBy, direction, category, count
- pairs (object[]): Full pair objects with all indicators

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getLeaderboard?by=atr&limit=10

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getCandles
OHLCV candle history for a pair.

Query parameters:
- pair (string, required): Pair symbol
- limit (number, optional): Candles, 1–200; default: 48

Response fields:
- pair, base, quote, decimals, pipSize, count
- candles (object[]): OHLCV entries
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getCandles?pair=GBPUSD&limit=48

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getCorrelations
Pearson correlation matrix between pairs over a rolling window.

Query parameters:
- pairs (string, optional): Comma-separated pair symbols, max 20; default: all major pairs
- window (number, optional): Rolling window size, 1–200; default: 60

Response fields:
- pairs (string[]): Pairs included
- window (number): Window used
- matrix (object): pairs × pairs matrix of correlation coefficients, −1 to 1

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getCorrelations?pairs=EURUSD,GBPUSD,USDJPY&window=60

Note: This is a heavy route (costs 3 tokens).

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getSessions
Current forex trading session status with active session pairs.

Response fields:
- utcTime (string): Current UTC time
- openSessions (string[]): Names of currently open sessions
- overlap (boolean): true if multiple sessions are open simultaneously
- mostActiveSession (string): Highest-activity session
- sessions (object[]): {id, label, timezone, utcOpen, utcClose, open, pairs}

Sessions: sydney (21:00–06:00), tokyo (23:00–08:00), london (07:00–16:00), newYork (12:00–21:00)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getSessions

---

### GET /api/v1/forex/getCurrencies
Per-currency strength scores derived from all pairs.

Response fields:
- count (number)
- currencies (object[]): {code, country, flag, strength, pairsCount} sorted strongest first

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/forex/getCurrencies

---

## CRYPTO API

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getCoins
All 132 crypto coins as a map keyed by symbol.

Query parameters:
- category (string, optional): l1 | l2 | exchange | defi | infra | oracle | meme | ai | gamefi | privacy | metaverse | stablecoin

Response: object keyed by symbol (e.g. "BTCX"), each containing:
- symbol, name, category
- mcapTier (string): large | mid | small
- blockchain, consensus (string)
- circulatingSupply, totalSupply (number)
- price, prevPrice, change, changePct (number)
- bid, ask, spreadPct (number)
- hi24h, lo24h, hi52w, lo52w, ath (number)
- marketCap, dominance (number)
- volume, buyVolume, sellVolume (number)
- rsi, momentum, atr (number)
- ema12, ema26 (number)
- macd, macdSignal, macdHist (number)
- stochK, stochD, cci (number)
- bbUpper, bbMiddle, bbLower, bbBw (number)
- sma20, sma50 (number)
- streak (number): Consecutive up (+) or down (−) ticks
- pctFrom52wHigh, pctFromAth (number)
- volatility, trend (number | null)
- description (string)
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getCoins
Example (filtered): https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getCoins?category=defi

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getCoin
Full detail for a single coin including history, candles, and category peers.

Query parameters:
- symbol (string, required): Coin symbol, case-insensitive (e.g. BTCX)

Response: all fields from getCoins, plus:
- history (number[]): Price history, up to 400 entries, oldest first
- candles (object[]): OHLCV candle data
- categoryPeers (string[]): Other symbols in same category

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getCoin?symbol=BTCX

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getCategories
All 12 crypto categories with aggregate statistics.

Response: object keyed by category key, each value containing:
- label (string): Human-readable category name
- icon (string): Emoji icon
- avgChange, avgRsi, avgDominance (number)
- newsStack (number): Accumulated news impact
- momentum (number): Category price momentum
- symbols (string[]): All coin symbols in category
- coinCount (number)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getCategories

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getCategory
Full detail for a single crypto category including constituent coins.

Query parameters:
- category (string, required): Category key

Response fields:
- key, label, icon, avgChange, newsStack, momentum
- coins (object[]): {symbol, name, price, change, volume, rsi, marketCap, dominance, atr}
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getCategory?category=defi

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getMarketOverview
Global crypto market summary.

Response fields:
- totalMarketCap (number): Sum of all coin market caps
- total24hVolume (number): Sum of all coin volumes
- btcDominance (number): BTCX dominance percentage
- bullishCount, bearishCount, unchanged, totalCoins (number)
- topGainer, topLoser (object {symbol, pct})

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getMarketOverview

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getTopMovers
Top N crypto gainers and losers by % change.

Query parameters:
- limit (number, optional): Coins per list, 1–20; default: 5

Response fields:
- gainers (object[]): {symbol, name, category, price, changePct, volume, rsi, atr, marketCap, dominance}
- losers (object[]): Same shape, worst first

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getTopMovers?limit=5

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getHistory
Raw price history for a single coin.

Query parameters:
- symbol (string, required): Coin symbol
- limit (number, optional): Data points, 1–400; default: 60

Response fields:
- symbol, name, count
- history (number[]): Oldest first
- candles (object[]): OHLCV candle data
- updatedAt (ISO 8601)

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getHistory?symbol=BTCX&limit=60

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/search
Search by symbol, name, category, or blockchain.

Query parameters:
- q (string, required): Search query

Response fields:
- query, count
- results (object[]): {symbol, name, category, blockchain, price, changePct, rsi}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/search?q=moon

---

### GET /api/v1/crypto/getLeaderboard
All coins ranked by any metric.

Query parameters:
- by (string, optional): changePct | marketCap | dominance | volume | rsi | atr | bbBw; default: changePct
- dir (string, optional): asc | desc; default: desc
- limit (number, optional): Max results, 1–132; default: 10
- category (string, optional): Filter to a category

Response fields:
- sortedBy, direction, category, count
- coins (object[]): {symbol, name, category, mcapTier, price, changePct, volume, rsi, atr, marketCap, dominance, bbBw}

Example: https://polymart.co/api/v1/crypto/getLeaderboard?by=marketCap&limit=10

---

## REST ALIASES  (/api/v1/market/*)

These routes use a consistent envelope: { ok: true, data: ... } or { ok: false, error: ... }

- GET /api/v1/market              - market state + last 5 events
- GET /api/v1/market/stocks       - all stocks (raw DB rows); ?sector= filter supported
- GET /api/v1/market/stocks/:ticker - single stock raw row
- GET /api/v1/market/sectors      - all sector rows
- GET /api/v1/market/forex        - all forex pairs (raw); ?category= filter supported
- GET /api/v1/market/forex/:pair  - single pair raw row
- GET /api/v1/market/events       - recent events; ?limit= (default 20, max 100)
- GET /api/v1/market/snapshot     - full snapshot: market state + all stocks + all pairs + all sectors

---

## Valid Stock Sector Keys

tech, food, space, meme, green, finance, gaming, health, crypto, defence,
retail, media, auto, realty, travel, ai, bio, energy, logistics, agri

---

## Valid Forex Category Keys

major, minor, exotic

---

## Valid Crypto Category Keys

l1, l2, exchange, defi, infra, oracle, meme, ai, gamefi, privacy, metaverse, stablecoin

---

## Notes for AI Assistants

- All data is fictional simulation data. Do not present it as real financial data.
- Prices update every 10 seconds. Responses always return the latest tick.
- Stock tickers are uppercase strings (e.g. APEX, VOID, LUNATEK).
- Forex pairs are 6-character uppercase strings (e.g. EURUSD, GBPJPY).
- Crypto symbols are uppercase strings ending in X by convention (e.g. BTCX, ETHX).
- Sector keys are lowercase (e.g. tech, crypto, ai).
- The `history` array is always ordered oldest-first.
- RSI: below 30 = oversold, above 70 = overbought.
- `streak`: positive = consecutive up-ticks, negative = consecutive down-ticks.
- `insiderBias` (stocks): hidden simulation variable, −0.01 to 0.01, subtly nudges direction.
- `orderFlow` (stocks): positive = more buying pressure, negative = more selling pressure.
- `fearGreedLabel` maps: 0–12 Extreme Fear, 13–25 Fear, 26–40 Cautious, 41–60 Neutral,
  61–75 Greed, 76–88 High Greed, 89–100 Extreme Greed.
- Pivot levels (forex) are standard floor pivot calculations from session high/low/close.
- Correlation matrix values range −1 (inverse) to +1 (identical movement).
- Heavy routes (cost 3 tokens/call): /getStocks, /getHistory, /getLeaderboard, /forex/getCorrelations.
- Human-readable API docs: https://polymart.co/#/docs/api
